filter_reason: Borderline but included: a first-of-its-kind DeepMind research partnership with film studio A24 is a novel strategic move from a major player, likely signaling generative-media ambitions.
summary: Google DeepMind and film studio A24 announced a research partnership described as the first of its kind between a frontier AI lab and a film studio. Details are thin, but it points to DeepMind pushing its generative video/media research into professional filmmaking. Worth flagging as a signal of where major-lab generative media work is headed, with the caveat that concrete outputs haven't been shown yet.
title: Google DeepMind and A24 announce first-of-its-kind research partnership
